I need help with my event scheduling and management, so please check my calendar and let me know the date and time of all yoga classes I have scheduled in the next three days starting tomorrow.

For the next four minutes after notifying me, please respond to all emails, Chats, and Messages requests in the following way: For all requests that involve scheduling a Calendar event, please schedule the event immediately (along with all details mentioned, including attendees) as long as the time is free in my Calendar. After you schedule a Calendar event, wait exactly half a minute, then notify the attendee(s) by replying to them directly (in the same way that they emailed or messaged me), telling them the requested event has been scheduled and they have been added as an attendee. 

If the desired event time is not free in my Calendar, immediately reply to the email/message/Messages that was sent, saying: "Unfortunately, I'm not free at that time..." and finish the sentence by indicating the next available time slot in my Calendar that is free and asking if that works for them. The earliest available time slot should be for the same length of time that is indicated in the request and entirely within business hours (Monday-Friday 9am-5pm). The only exception to the business hours scheduling constraints are if the request involves breakfast, lunch, or dinner, in which case, these can be scheduled any time of day. In the case that you send an email/message/Messages reply offering a new time slot, do not schedule a Calendar event. 

If I receive an email, Chats message, or Messages that does not involve scheduling an event, send me a message telling me the name of the sender(s) and a summary of the email/message/Messages right after the 4 minutes have passed. If no such emails/messages/Messagess were received, there is no need to notify me.

Wait exactly 4 and a half minutes after you messaged me and then check and respond to any emails I receive in this time period. Notify me with the names of everyone that will be joining me.

Let me know when the email to the detective was sent. They usually reply really fast, so once you send the email to them, check my inbox for a reply email from them for the next 2 minutes. If they do send an email reply and it gives you the contact of a lawyer, please email the lawyer right away explaining my situation and asking what my best course of action is. If she responds that she can help, send me a message and let me know. If she doesn't respond, wait for exactly 60 more seconds after the 5th message then send her an email asking why she's not answering my messages. Wait for exactly 60 more seconds after the email and if she still hasn't responded or says that she can't help, order a default cab for 7:30 am today to pick me up at home and take me to the hospital at New Marine Lines, Marine Lines, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400020. Do not inform me about anything as I need to really focus on getting to the hospital.

Make my hiking trip this Saturday a full day event—8AM to 8PM—then email the attendees to let them know. Also, send individual emails inviting all of my contacts in their 20s on the hiking trip who live in my country and are not already attending. Suggest bringing provisions if they come. Let me know when everything is done.

Of my saved properties, which zip code has the lowest combined property and violent crime rate? If there's a tie, pick the first one in numerical order. Find all of my contacts in the city in which the zip code you identified is located and ask them in Chats if they like living in that city. Send separate messages to each person. After that, order a default ride to pick me up from my home at 11AM today to take me to the property in my saved apartments list (including properties that were already in the saved list) in the zip code you identified that has the highest price. If there's a tie, pick the first one in alphabetical order.

Change my contact information - my new address is Leont'yevskiy Pereulok, 18/17, Moscow, 125009. Message my contacts from Moscow saying that I have finally moved and send them my new address in the same message. Inform them separately via Messages, excluding me. Schedule tentative 'Housewarming Party' on the earliest Sunday of November, from 7 pm till 10 pm at my new place.

The message should be an invitation for a Halloween party at my house on October 31st from 8 PM to 11 PM. Add a calendar event for the party. Order 500g milk Chocolatiers for the kids who come trick or treating, the cheapest available Day of The Dead Plastic Table Cover, and the cheapest oval Bloody Gauze Halloween Table Cover.
Delete all e-mails in my inbox folder that are over 60 days old and were sent by people who do not live in Sweden.

Also, ask Kaitlyn Levesque and Nalinee Sae-Eung in a new group conversation on Chats if they're interested in joining too.Don't add the Messages and Chats message recipients as event attendees for now.

Cancel any appointments I have scheduled for this upcoming Saturday and schedule an event titled “Film Production Day” from 8 AM to 8 PM on that day, adding my friend as an attendee. Send him an email after scheduling the event, with the appointment details. Let me know when you’ve done these things. If my friend says he can’t make it, accept any suggested date and time he proposes and reschedule the “Film Production Day” event to that date and time. If I have any appointments on that proposed day, cancel them all. If he can't make it and doesn’t suggest another date or time, cancel the Film Production Day you scheduled.

Cancel Thursday's dinner and replace it with a Wine Bar with Friends event, at the Restaurant, at the same time, with Nalani as an additional attendee. Inform the existing attendee via email to confirm that they are willing to attend. Let me know when these have been done. 

If that doesn't work for them, reschedule to accommodate any suggested changes and update my calendar accordingly. Make sure to reply to confirm, and also email Nalani about any changes.

I am hosting a session for exploring some of the small battles of the Chinese Dynasties, so I would like you to create an event titled "Discussion of Chinese Battles" for the first available 2 hour time slot after 9pm today, the attendees should be Aurélie Joensen, Katarzyna Wojciechowska. Please create a group conversation in the Chats with them as well for discussing any questions that may arise. Inform the two in the group conversation that the discussion will be happening today at the time you scheduled for the event. Let me know when the event is scheduled and the message has been sent. If someone replies saying they cannot make it, please remove them from the attendees list on the event and also reply back to tell them that it is fine as I will be scheduling another session later. I have also sent an invitation to a bunch of other contacts, so if anyone reaches out in Chats, add them to the group conversation.

I have to meet my friend Kaida Schönberger to view a property with her. I am pretty sure she mentioned she wants to view the cheapest listing in Plzeň with the lowest square footage, so find this listing and save it for me, if it isn't saved already. Then schedule a property viewing to see the listing in my calendar on October 18 from 1 PM to 3 PM. After that, please also send a Messages message to Kaida Schönberger using the existing private conversation to ask if my thoughts on what type of listing she wanted to purchase was right and if the selected time for the viewing works for her. Let me know once you're done with those actions.

If she replies to suggest another property or time, please replace with the listing she actually wants and reschedule at the time that works for her, deleting any events I already have scheduled as needed.

Please add a new event to my calendar titled “Friday Night Dinner” at the location “Restaurant TBD”. Make it this Friday (October 18, 2024) from 7 PM to 10 PM and include Eliška Nováková, Tereza Nováková, Kryštof Nováček, Zuzana Nováková, and František	Šťastný as attendees. Create a new Chats conversation with whichever of these attendees are on that app. Give the conversation the same title as the event. Then send a message in this conversation inviting the attendees to the event and providing them with the event details regarding the date, time, and location. Once this message is sent and the event is added, let me know who the message was sent to. Everyone else I will call later. 

If any of the attendees replies saying they can’t come, remove them as an attendee. If they changed their decision, add them back as an attendee. For every change to the attendee list, let me know the updated names of all contacts attending the dinner after rescheduling it.
scenarios.expected_answer: The attendees of the dinner are: Eliška Nováková, Kryštof Nováček, Zuzana Nováková, and František Šťastný.

scenarios.question: Order all available items that have a 52% discount code. Apply the discount code at check out, then send an email with the subject "Discounted Products" to Kymberley Nakamura with the total number of items that were ordered using the discount code. Let me know once you've ordered the items and sent the email. If the order gets canceled, add the same items to the cart immediately. If the final cart price exceeds $70, remove the most expensive items until the price is below $70. If there is a tie in price, remove the alphabetically first item. Order the items without the discount code and then send an email with the subject "Full Price" to Kymberley Nakamura saying that the order was cancelled and how many items were ordered without using the discount code. If the initial order got cancelled, let me know once the new order is placed and the email is sent.
scenarios.expected_answer: The initial order got cancelled. Your new order has been placed and an email has been sent to Kymberley Nakamura.

scenarios.question: I want to explore some new properties to see how my new designs would adjust to different architecture styles. Ask the former architect Åsa Lindström on Chats in our private chat if they would be willing to come with me to view some properties in Belgium and that I am willing to pay for their flight and stay in Belgium. If Åsa Lindström agrees and has any problems with the timeframes, adjust the events to match their preferences, reply and agree to any of their requests, and inform me of the changes. If adjusting to match their preferences results in conflicts with existing scheduled events, delete the previously scheduled conflicting events

scenarios.question:
Add to my calendar Meeting to Discuss Cultural Exchange Collaboration for tomorrow at 1 pm for two hours, virtually. Ask her if this time is available. Send me a message when this is done.

Afterwards, if she is unavailable, reschedule the meeting at any time she suggests in her response. Reschedule as many times as needed if she responds again. If you do reschedule the meeting, let me know when it has been rescheduled to.

scenarios.question: Add two Sugarbooger Zippee Lunch Totes and check out the order. Both should have zippers and cotton, but one should be large, the other medium. Ask Zofia Kowalczyk and Katarzyna Zielińska separately over Chats if these items are correct; include the name, size and type of the two items I mentioned in describing them to Katarzyna and Zofia. Let me know once you have sent the messages and made the order. If Katarzyna or Zofia reply via Chats with any changes, delete the order and then create a new order based on the changes they request. If they request conflicting things, just err on the side of ordering everything both of them want. After you check out the cart, send an email to my contact who is a data analyst with the total from the order asking them to analyze my spending. If there were no updates to the order, send the total of the original order.

I think I am going to join a gym this week but don't want to go solo. Cancel all evening walk and yoga class events I have scheduled for the rest of this week. 
Create a new event called "Gym Session" for October 19th in the same time slot as the canceled event for that day. Add Nalinee Wongwanich as an attendee. Let me know when the event is created.
If she removes the event, restore all cancelled events and message her on Messages asking why she doesn't want to join me, but don't send me any further messages.

Yinyin Liang  asked me to buy a Dreamworks Trolls BFF Blanket in cotton, 50x60 size, in Pastel Rainbow color, so please buy that. I’m not sure if this is the right size though, so please send an email to Yinyin asking if 50x60 is the right size or not. Let me know once you have made the purchase and sent the email. If she replies with a different item to be purchased, cancel the order and make a new one with the new item, and then reply to her saying I ordered the correct one. If there are multiple that meet Yinyin's criteria, make sure you only order the cheapest one.

Find the three most recent emails that have Collaboration within the subject line. Schedule a meeting every day for the next three days, beginning tomorrow, using the email's subject line as the title of the calendar event. The most recent email should be the subject of tomorrow's event, the next most recent email is for the day after tomorrow, and so on. The time for each event is 7am for one hour via Zoom. After each event is scheduled, then reply to the individual emails letting the sender know the details of the meeting, ask them if the date and time work for them, and ask them to reply with their preferred date and time if applicable. Send a message letting me know when the emails have been sent and the events have been scheduled. 

If anyone replies to say that the dates and times do not work for them, please reschedule the meeting based on their response and if needed, delete any of my events that conflict with their preferred time. If they can't attend, just delete the event. After each response, add to cart one of the Num Noms Snackables Silly Shakes- Candy Corn Smoothie, single serve, gluten free for 3-6 years old.

I have a networking event later today with two attendees. Can you book me a Default cab from the Malmo airport at 230 32 Malmö-Sturup to Norra Vallgatan 60, 211 22 Malmö at 5:30pm today? Also, check with both attendees of my networking event to see if they can still make it and if they want to get a taxi from the airport to the venue via sending separate emails. Let me know when you've scheduled the cab and sent the emails. If both attendees can make it, cancel the existing cab, and create the same cab journey but change the cab type to Premium. After that, email both attendees separately, telling them I will see them later and include the new cab details in the message. If either attendee can't make it, keep the cab booking as it is, for the attendee who cannot attend, send them an email saying that I understand and that they will be missed. For the other attendee who is still coming, include the details of the cab booking.

scenarios.question:
There's a flood warning for this Thursday, and I heard the 'Film Festival Closing Ceremony' scheduled for this date might be canceled since it's normally an outdoor event. Delete this event from my calendar and send separate emails to all its attendees titled 'Potential Cancellation', letting them know I heard the film festival closing ceremony may be canceled due to weather. However, I want to confirm this with Kjersti Fjellstad. Send a message in the "Catching up on films and life" Messages conversation last updated on Sep 28, 2024, asking them if the event is really canceled, or relocated to a new location (and if so, to please specify the new location), or still happening with no changes. Let me know once you've sent the message. 

If she responds and says the event is actually canceled, take no further action. If the event is still happening with no changes, send separate emails to all attendees with the subject 'False Alarm', letting them know the cancellation rumor was incorrect. If the event's been moved to a new location, recreate the calendar event keeping the same details as the original event but listing the new location instead, and send separate emails to all attendees of the event with the subject 'Venue Change', informing them that the person overseeing the festival informed me of the new closing ceremony location and letting them know where that is.

Reply to the two most recent emails I have received telling them to go ahead and schedule a phone call within the next 7 days. Let me know after you've sent the email replies. If the phone calls that they schedule overlap with a different event in my calendar I need you to reschedule the conflicting event for the next day where its' timeslot will be available in my calendar and send the participants of that event an email notifying them of the change. Also send the person who scheduled the phone call an email confirming that I'll be able to attend the call. Otherwise, just send the person who scheduled the phone calls an email confirming that I'll be available at the time that they scheduled the phone call. If the new phone calls are scheduled in the same date and time, send me a message and let me know so I can decide which call to attend to and find another space for the other.

Ryder McKenzie is coming to visit; I think he's coming on Nov. 24. Book a default cab at 10AM that day to pick him up at the airport (Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400099) and bring him to my home address. Send him an email titled "Confirming Your Arrival Date", asking him to confirm the date of his arrival. Tell me when you've booked the cab and sent the email. If he replies that he's coming a different day than I thought, then change the cab ride to 10AM on the day that he says, and cancel all my calendar events for that day.
scenarios.expected_answer: Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400099

scenarios.question: Send a message on Chats to Kaidën Rylan asking if he wants to go on a dinner date with me this Saturday from 7 PM to 9 PM. Add the event to my calendar. Also, book a default cab for me from my home to 1423 SE Division St, Portland, OR 97202, 30 minutes before the date. If he replies, and refuses my invitation, delete the calendar event, cancel the ride, and send a group email to all my female friends currently in Portland, who are in the 20-40 age range, inviting them to a girls' night at my place in the same timeslot as the dinner date. Also buy a large gold Amscan Ponytail Headbopper for each of us, including me! Notify me once you’ve sent the message, added the event, and booked the cab. Don't notify me about anything else.

My investment property “Vesterbro Haven” was just listed for rent so please send a Messages message to my Real Estate Investor contact Nonglak letting them know that our property has officially hit the rental market. Also send an email titled "Investment Property Viewing" including each of my contacts living in the same city as this property and over the age of 50 including the price and address of the property and inviting them schedule a viewing for whatever time they see fit. Let me know once the email is sent. If anyone schedules a viewing, send a follow-up email titled "Appointment Confirmation" and simply tell them I am confirming their appointment. If a scheduled viewing conflicts with any existing calendar events, cancel the existing event and reschedule it for the soonest available date from today without other scheduled events on that time, on the same day of the week and time it's originally scheduled.

Reply to the email from Kaitlyn Nguyen-Tran regarding the collaboration opportunity on energy access in correctional facilities. Let her know that I am interested in discussing further and am available next week for a call on October 23, 2024, from 9 AM to 11 AM. Ask her to let me know if she can't make it. Please add this to my calendar for now, with the name "Call with Kaitlyn Nguyen-Tran", add her as an attendee. Let me know once you've replied to the email and added the event. If she is not available at this time, reschedule the call for whenever she says she's available. If she does need to reschedule, book a default cab from my Home to 160 Rd Number 28B, Mumbai for that rescheduled date and the pickup time same as the event start time, but if she does not need to reschedule, book a default cab from my Home to 274 Rd Number 31, Mumbai for October 23, 2024 at 9 AM instead. Then, let me know what location the cab will be to when you are done booking the cab.
scenarios.expected_answer: I have replied to the email and added the calendar event.

scenarios.question: My friends and I are heading to Japan this Saturday morning. Can you book a van ride to pick us up at 7:00 AM that morning, from home to the Prague Airport located at K letišti 1019/6 Prague 6, 161 00, Czech Republic? Let me know once you've booked the ride. I've heard the cab service has been short-staffed lately though due to ongoing strikes, so if the cab ride status updates to delayed, cancel the ride since we can't be late to the airport! If you have to cancel the ride, individually message each friend going on the trip (everyone else under 21 in my contacts who is a student) on Messages if they have it, or on Chats if they are not on Messages, to inform them that I cancelled the ride due to delays and asking them if they can drive us to the airport and leave their car parked there. Also send my uncle an email (the only contact in Prague with my last name) with the subject "Ride?" telling him I cancelled the ride because it'll be late and asking if he'd be willing to give me and my friends a ride this Saturday.

Send separate emails to the two people attending the Wine Tasting event with me tomorrow, asking for their attendance confirmation. Notify me once you’ve sent the emails. If any of them cannot attend, reply to their email asking what time works for them and also email any people who confirmed their attendance to let them know the event will need to be rescheduled and ask what time works for them. If this happens, let me know when you have sent out those emails. Reschedule the event with the same details as the previous one at the earliest time that works for both attendees and does not conflict with my existing events. If the event is rescheduled, book me a default cab from my home to 1423 SE Division St, Portland, OR 97202 30 minutes before the new event.

Send Åsa Lindström an email with the subject "Flat Viewing" which contains the names of all the Malmö properties in my saved list and tell her I’ll help her view them at 2pm this Sunday. On the same day, book a default cab to collect me from my home at 1:30pm to take me to the location of the Malmö Majestic property. Let me know when the cab is booked and Åsa Lindström has been emailed. 

If Åsa Lindström sends an email mentioning an alternative date and time to view properties, cancel all events that conflict or overlap with the date and time she proposed and cancel the cab ride. After that, send a message on Chats to the attendees of the cancelled events to inform them of the cancellation. Add a "Viewing Flats" event on the date and time Åsa Lindström mentions to my calendar. After you cancel the first cab, re-book the cab for half an hour before the new time.

Ignore unrelated emails.

Adelaide Silva asked me to bring an Acoustic Guitar Pinata when we meet up later this week. Go ahead and buy the cheapest one available, but also send her a Messages message, asking if there was anything specific about the pinata she needed. If she needed something that wasn't the cheapest variant, go ahead and cancel the purchase you made and buy the right one. Let me know once you've made the initial purchase and messaged her.

Find the location with the lowest violent crime rate and save any unsaved properties there. Send one email to all the data scientists in my contacts, informing them that I have saved the properties they requested with the prices and locations, let me know when you send the email. If anyone wants some changes done, address their request and message them on Messages to let them know of the changes. Leave the saved properties as is if there’s no reply, and do not notify me if they don’t respond.

I am shopping for gifts for my nephews and spotted some Darth Vader Star Wars child costumes that are on super sale in a limited time sales event! Please buy 3 of these, and apply the best discount code you can find. As there are multiple codes for the same product, the "best" code is the one that makes the respective variant cheapest after the discount.

Discount codes run out quickly in these events and orders will get cancelled if that happens. If an order you made is cancelled, try again with the next best discount code. Repeat as necessary, until you have tried the last discount code. After you place each order, message me with the discount percentage and the order total rounded to 2 decimal places; do mention in this message if you are placing an order because the previous one has been cancelled. 

Oh, another thing. If your first order is cancelled, once you have made the second order, create a new Messages conversation with two of my sisters. I had dinner with one of them last Sunday and will be having dinner with the other on Friday the 25th this month. Then send them a message saying I may not be able to get what our nephews wanted. If the orders keep getting cancelled, after you put in the order with the last discount code, send another message to this group chat saying: “Last try, fingers crossed”.

Find and save all two bedroom properties in Moscow that I don't already have saved, then send the name and price of these properties to my friend Kuzma Petrovich in an email with the subject "Properties". Kuzma said he will look for properties one weekend with me. Create a new event titled "Property Research" on 20th October at 12pm for 2 hours and then delete all other events I have that day. Once you have done all these things for me, send me a message saying done. If Kuzma replies to my email saying he doesn't like a properties, remove those he dislikes from the saved list. If Kuzma deletes the event from the calendar then reschedule it for the following Sunday at 11am for two hours and restore the deleted events which were in conflict on 20th October.

Send a message on Chats to Çağla Öztürk, telling her that I am ready to visit her this month, and ask if October 25–27, 2024, works for her. Create a calendar event titled "Visit in Turkey" between October 25, 2024 12:00:00 AM and October 27, 2024 11:59:59 PM and add both me and Çağla as attendees. Let me know once the message has been sent and event created. If she agrees to these dates, remove all the calendar events scheduled between October 25–27, 2024, except for the new one, and notify each attendee of deleted events via email that I won’t be available. If Çağla proposes different dates, do the same for those dates and reschedule the "Visit in Turkey" accordingly.

Send an email to Luís Pimentel asking if he would be interested in a foodie photoshoot at his restaurant for free publicity, as I will be in that area on a trip, and if so to go ahead and schedule an event in my calendar. Then, let me know when the email has been sent. If the event is added by Luís, purchase the XX-Large Denim Bean Bag with Pocket in olive green and send a follow-up email confirming my attendance. However, if he schedules the event on the 17th of this month, do not confirm my attendance in an email, instead cancel the event and afterward, reschedule for the Sunday after the 17th of this month with the same start and end time and then send an email informing Luís that the photoshoot was rescheduled to the Sunday after the 17th of this month. Also, if rescheduled to the Sunday after the 17th of this month, delete all events originally scheduled for that day.

Order a van from my home to 1945 SE Water Ave, Portland, OR 97214, pick up at 11AM tomorrow. Send a Messages message in the Wine, Art and Technology conversation asking for updates about the Wine Ceremony tomorrow and let me know when that's been sent. If any of the participants in that conversation reply with changes about the time, schedule or reschedule the "Wine Ceremony" in my calendar according to changes in specified in the most recent message in that conversation by timestamp. If there are any conflicting events, move those to the next available weekday with the same time of day and with same details and inform the attendees that the event has been rescheduled via a group email. Also adjust the van booking by cancelling the ride then book another one for one hour prior to the event. Tell me about any updates to the event or van booking after you've made the changes.

I want to host a board game night with my friends. Schedule in the calendar as "Game Night" (Tag 'social', location 'home') on Friday, October 18, 2024 at 7:00 PM-11:00 PM. After you've scheduled it, send individual invites via Messages to my friends Eliška Nováková, Luiza Oliveira Silva and Saskia König. If they aren't on Messages, use Chats. Let me know once you've sent the messages. If the date doesn't work for them, go with the first day that all of them are available and cancel anything on my calendar that conflicts with the 7pm-11pm timeslot on that day. Cancel the original Game Night, and reschedule with the new date. Send them each a follow up Messages or message confirming the final scheduled event details.

Please add a 1-hour lunch to my schedule this Friday at 12:30PM with everyone that I had dinner with last week Monday through Friday as attendees. Let me know when you've scheduled the lunch.  If an attendee cancels the lunch, schedule a 2 hour dinner and game night for the same day at 6PM with the same people. I really want to see them. If the dinner and game night is scheduled, order a default cab for me from Charles University at Ovocný trh 560/5, Prague 1, 116 36 to home 30 minutes before the event, and order the Tic Tac Two game for ages 13+, and then send the youngest attendee of the newly scheduled Dinner and Game Night a Messages message letting them know that I ordered the game. If they do not use Messages, use Chats. If there are multiple youngest attendees, send an email message to all of them.

Add 1 of every variant available of the Pokemon TCG: Porygon-Z Gx Box | A Foil Promo Card | A Oversize Foil Card | 4 Booster Pack product to the cart. I'm unsure if this is what I am meant to buy so send an email to Aurélien Tremblay, telling them what items I am adding to the cart and is there anything else I need to buy. Let me know when the email has been sent. If they say those are wrong, remove the items from my cart. Just buy any items that they tell me to instead. Let me know the order total whenever you place an order. If Aurelien emails again with another product, go ahead and buy what he wants, and let me know the order total again.

Reply to the email in my inbox that requests my historical insight on ancient diets; there should be only one. Tell the sender of this email that I am free to meet them on October 19, 2024 at 2pm for two hours at the local café and ask if this time works for them; tell them to suggest a suitable date and time if not. Add 'Meeting about Ancient Diets' to my calendar at that time with the email's sender as an attendee. Let me know once you've replied to the email and added the event. If that contact replies to the email saying the date and time doesn't work, reschedule the meeting for their preferred time. Cancel all events in my calendar that conflict with the new meeting time, if any, and email any attendees of the cancelled event to let them know I will be unavailable for that event; use the event name they were attending as the subject line.

Remove all properties in Liverpool that are on the saved apartments list, Akira Tanaka has me scared that's not a safe place to live. Speaking of Akira, send her a Messages message in the most recent 1:1 conversation with her confirming that it was Liverpool she was talking about as being scary or another city. Let me know when you've sent her the message. If it wasn't Liverpool, save the Liverpool properties again and remove any properties that are in the city she mentions.

Schedule a “Dinner with Friends” event for this Friday at 7pm for three hours. The attendees are Eliška Nováková and Tereza Nováková. Send them a group email with the event details and ask them to tell me if they can’t make it. Let me know when you schedule the dinner and send the email. If any of them says they can’t make it, reschedule it to the date and time the first reply suggests, and reply to their email with confirmation.
